patch.value: Add RELEASE_PAT directly in GitHub environment release. The token must have repository contents write permission and protected-branch bypass capability. Do not place the token in pm, source files, logs, or chat. After configuration, dispatch Auto Release with dry_run=true and push=false, then perform the first intentional push-enabled run.
Configure RELEASE_PAT for protected-master auto-release pushes
The release environment contains NPM_TOKEN but lacks the maintainer token required to push a checked release commit and tag through protected master and trigger the downstream tag workflow.
Run gh secret list --env release and observe only NPM_TOKEN; production Auto Release with push=true fails its explicit preflight.
release environment exposes both NPM_TOKEN and RELEASE_PAT names and the protected-master release push can trigger Publish Release.
Only NPM_TOKEN is configured; no secret value is readable or transferable by the agent.
Scheduled releases remain safely disabled until a maintainer provisions the secret.

value.author: codex-auto-release
value.text: pm-cli release environment confirms the matching secret name exists there,but GitHub does not expose secret values for copying.

value.author: codex-auto-release
value.text: Provision this secret directly in GitHub; never store its value in tracked pm metadata.

value.author: codex-auto-release
value.text: GITHUB_TOKEN-generated pushes do not provide the downstream workflow trigger semantics used by the reference pipeline.

value.note: Fails fast when RELEASE_PAT is absent

patch.value: The release environment lists RELEASE_PAT and a push-enabled Auto Release completes the protected-master handoff.

author: codex-auto-release

value.author: codex-auto-release
value.text: Validated the npm credential with npm whoami and configured both required secret names in the protected GitHub release environment. No credential values were read into or stored in pm data.

patch.value: The release environment now lists both NPM_TOKEN and RELEASE_PAT; npm authentication resolves to the expected package owner.
Configured and validated the required release environment credentials without storing their values in repository or pm data.

message: Record credential configuration without secret material

patch.value: Both required secret names are configured and npm authentication succeeds as the expected package owner.
The release environment lists NPM_TOKEN and RELEASE_PAT and npm authentication resolves to the package owner.
Required release environment credentials are configured and authentication is validated.
